utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all seven of these items. Each one is fully specified: destination (Prague, Czech Republic) clearly given; travel_dates (October 5–9, 2024) specific; transportation (flight details with cost €125) complete; accommodation (hotel name, location, cost per night, total cost) complete; activities (list of activities with individual and total costs) complete; additional_services (dining arrangements with cost per day and total cost) complete; total_budget (cost breakdown and remaining budget) complete. Thus, all 7/7 items are covered and fully specified.
